evidence_summary: Alnylam U.S., Inc. is a 100% wholly owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc. According to SEC filings (Exhibit 21.1) and the company's 10-K reports, Alnylam U.S., Inc. was formed in June 2002 as the initial corporate entity and became a subsidiary following a reorganization when Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc. was incorporated in May 2003.
